text: A street scene in an urban area, likely Vietnam. A man wearing a white shirt and jeans is riding a red bicycle across a crosswalk. The background features a large, yellow building with brown, arched window shutters. A blue and white striped fence runs along the sidewalk in front of the building. Traffic lights and a blue trash bin are visible on the right side of the road. The scene is bright and sunny.
